notes: WORLD's six-face arcana die. CLOSED OK is the highest success. CHECK AGAIN is the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The loop ties off. Advance two.
Success ★. You can leave. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The pegboard wants a look. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 CLOSURE).
Partial. The till wants a recount. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 CLOSURE).
Failure. The impulse took the round. +1 CLOSURE.
Wild. ★ if Theroux is visible this turn (the frog tank is in line of sight). Otherwise: failure, and the minnow filter sounds like a question.
